data.personalStatement: Agricultural and Biosystems Engineer with specialized focus on renewable energy systems and solar design. Proficient in PV system sizing and creating detailed electrical drawings using AutoCAD. Eager to apply technical skills to advance solar energy projects.

workExperience.title: Solar Design Engineer
workExperience.subtitle: GreenTech Solutions
bullets: Designed photovoltaic systems for residential and commercial installations
Performed PV system sizing calculations using industry-standard software
Created detailed electrical drawings using AutoCAD for solar projects
Conducted site assessments to optimize solar system placement and efficiency
Prepared technical documentation for solar installation projects

workExperience.title: Solar Intern
bullets: Installed and configured solar photovoltaic systems
Assisted in designing solar layouts for optimal energy production
Collaborated with engineering team on renewable energy solutions

workExperience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Analyzed electric mobility data to support renewable energy integration
Developed Python scripts for data analysis and system modeling

skills.skills: Solar Design, PV System Sizing, AutoCAD, PVSyst, Renewable Energy
Python, Electrical Engineering, System Modeling, Technical Documentation
Site Assessment, Project Planning, Technical Analysis
